title: SSA Catalog Schema
description: Canonical schema for SSA catalog/index JSON files (e.g., breads.catalog.json). Supports minimal catalog entries (id + tags) while remaining forward-compatible for richer catalog metadata and items.

defaults.description: Optional catalog defaults used by planners (e.g., default tags, filter hints).

domain.description: Domain/grouping. Keep permissive to support catalogs beyond recipes (e.g., equipment, lexicons).

label.description: Optional human-friendly label; kept for compatibility with older data.

CatalogItem.description: A single catalog entry. Minimal required is id + tags. Extra properties allowed for forward compatibility (paths, groups, search hints, nutrition tags, etc.).

path.description: Optional relative path to the referenced JSON, if you want explicit linking.

label.description: Optional display label (fallback if recipe meta.name not loaded).

group.description: Optional grouping bucket for UI (e.g., 'sandwich loaves', 'artisan', 'quick breads').

rank.description: Optional ordering hint. Lower numbers appear earlier.

status.description: Optional lifecycle flag for catalog entries.

refs.description: Optional cross references (related IDs, aliases, etc.).
